        lookup
      • lookup[H](table: ComponentTable[H]; customId: string): Option[ tuple[handler: H, captures: Table[string, string]]]
        resolveLeaf
      • resolveLeaf(cmd: SlashCommand; path: seq[string]): Option[SlashNode]

Command registration and lookup.

The DSL macros in dsl expand to calls into this module; the procs are public so commands can also be registered programmatically.

Imports

types, extract

Procs

proc addButtonHandler(handler: InteractionHandler; customId: string;
                      run: ComponentRun) {....raises: [DimslashError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc addMessageCommand(handler: InteractionHandler; cmd: MessageCommand) {.
    ...raises: [DimslashError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc addModalHandler(handler: InteractionHandler; customId: string;
                     run: ModalRun) {....raises: [DimslashError], tags: [],
                                      forbids: [].}
proc addSelectHandler(handler: InteractionHandler; customId: string;
                      run: ComponentRun) {....raises: [DimslashError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc addSlashCommand(handler: InteractionHandler; cmd: SlashCommand) {.
    ...raises: [DimslashError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc addUserCommand(handler: InteractionHandler; cmd: UserCommand) {.
    ...raises: [DimslashError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc lookup[H](table: ComponentTable[H]; customId: string): Option[
    tuple[handler: H, captures: Table[string, string]]]
Exact custom_id match first, then patterns in priority order. 
proc resolveLeaf(cmd: SlashCommand; path: seq[string]): Option[SlashNode] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Follows a group/subcommand path (as produced by extract.leafOptions) down the command tree to the leaf that should run.
